The partnership centers on AMD's Helios rack scale platform and aims to support large AI training sites. The collaboration extends AMD's role beyond supplying chips into broader AI infrastructure solutions. For investors tracking AMD, this move highlights how the company is positioning itself across the AI value chain, not just in chips but in full rack scale infrastructure. As AI workloads become...

news.summary_en: Chip stocks led Wall Street higher Thursday after Micron raised its US manufacturing pledge to $250 billion and a leaked Meta memo lit a fire under optics names, while PepsiCo and Levi Strauss both fell despite solid quarters. Oil retreated from its Iran-driven spike, existing home sales cooled again, and Meta put a price tag on its best AI model for the first time.

news.title_en: NLight Flashes Buy Signal On U.S. Contract For Missile, Drone Defense
news.title_zh: NLight Flashes Buy Signal On U.S. Contract For Missile, Drone Defense
news.summary_en: NLight stock blasted higher on Thursday, flashing an early buy signal after the Defense Department tapped the Camas, Wash., company to create the next-generation architecture for low-cost U.S. missile and drone defense.  Lockheed Martin's Aculight unit also was selected for the Joint Laser Weapon System program.  Craig-Hallum hiked its price target on NLight to 100 from 80, keeping a buy rating, according to The Fly investment news site.
